creator: yuripv@FreeBSD.org
text: Yes, the added code is a bit naive and does not properly process the message buffer, so it could be filling up and iLO misbehaving (that's why I'm asking if there's anything in iLO log, via BIOS or web interface).  That said it's been in production for us for over a year, and we don't see any issues (and the monitoring software queries all sensors, IPMB ones included, pretty often), still it would be nice to implement it properly, and this looks like a good reason (just need to get access to HPE system again, could be a while).
